stranger_greet.speaker: Stranger
stranger_greet.text:
Another one. Another night walker.
You look like you're heading somewhere.

stranger_response.speaker: Stranger
stranger_response.text:
They smile. A tired smile, like someone who's been waiting.
"Everybody walks this route eventually. You'll see what I mean."

stranger_walked.speaker: Stranger
stranger_walked.text:
"Many times. But everyone's walk is different."
They gesture toward the street.
"The convenience store has good coffee. You'll need it."

stranger_recognition.speaker: Stranger
stranger_recognition.text:
They pause. A flicker of something in their eyes.
"Maybe you do. Maybe you've seen me in a dream.
Or maybe I've seen you. Same thing."

stranger_ignore.speaker: Narrator
stranger_ignore.text:
You walk past without slowing.
The stranger's gaze follows you — you can feel it on your back.
The glass door swings open. Cold air hits your face.

stranger_farewell.speaker: Stranger
stranger_farewell.text:
"Walk well. I'll see you around."
They step back into the shadow of the lobby.
You push through the door into the night.
